subject: Gowasu, green-skinned Supreme Kai in robes, seated or standing with purple-black energy rising
description: A green-skinned humanoid figure is depicted in a mid-shot, wearing elaborate layered robes in light and dark tones. His skin is clearly green, with a dignified elder appearance — relatively calm expression. Purple-black energy or dark lightning rises around or behind him, contrasting with his composed demeanor. The background is dark with swirling dark-energy effects. He wears what appears to be a Supreme Kai-style garment with layered structured robes. His posture reads as authoritative or contemplative.
foreground: Green-skinned elder figure in layered Supreme Kai robes, surrounded by rising dark-purple energy
background: Dark void with swirling dark-purple energy
